title: PPL Buys Narragansett Electric, Expands Renewable Operation
text: PPL is likely to benefit from its domestic focus and the expansion of its clean power generation via the acquisition of Narragansett Electric from National Grid.

title: PPL Shares With Relative Strength Despite Bad News In 2022
text: PPL has bounced back nicely after a dividend cut in February. Utilities continue to outperform, and PPL has been a sector leader.

title: PPL Corp (PPL) CEO Vincent Sorgi on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: PPL Corp, Inc. (NYSE:PPL ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 5, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Andrew Ludwig - VP, IR Vincent Sorgi - President, CEO & Director Gregory Dudkin - EVP & COO Joseph Bergstein - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Securities Nicholas Campanella - Crédit Suisse Steven Fleishman - Wolfe Research Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Securities Paul Zimbardo - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Michael Lapides - Goldman Sachs Group Operator Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the PPL Corporation's First Quarter Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions].

title: PPL (PPL) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: PPL (PPL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.50% and 11.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Utility Stocks' Q1 Earnings Due on May 5: D, EVRG, PPL & More
text: Let's focus on utility stocks D, EVRG, PPL, ED and SRE that are scheduled to release first-quarter earnings on May 5.
